warnings: Dropped 1 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Penalty Points). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Demonstrates understanding of the role play and defines problem(s) to be solved
criteria.description: Shows comprehension of the simulated scenario and identifies the issue(s) that need resolution.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Neither a summary of the role play nor any problems were presented.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Either a summary of the role play was given, or the problem(s) were identified, but not both.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Both a summary of the role play and the problem(s) were clearly presented.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Exhibits a deep understanding of the role play's context and precisely articulates the problem(s).

criteria.name: Identifies alternatives and the pro(s) and con(s) of each
criteria.description: Presents various options and analyzes the advantages and disadvantages associated with each.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No different courses of action were suggested.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or more alternatives were offered, but their benefits or drawbacks were not examined.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A minimum of two alternatives were proposed, with an analysis of their respective advantages and disadvantages.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Several distinct alternatives were presented, and a thorough analysis of multiple pros and cons was provided for each.

criteria.name: Identifies logical solution and aspects of implementation
criteria.description: Proposes a reasonable solution and outlines how it would be put into practice.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No course of action was proposed.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: A solution was suggested, but a strategy for carrying it out was not detailed.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A sensible solution was presented, along with a well-developed plan for its execution.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: A practical solution and a comprehensive implementation plan were developed, including the identification of necessary resources.

criteria.name: Demonstrates knowledge and understanding of the event knowledge areas:
criteria.description: Demonstrates knowledge and understanding of the event knowledge areas: Event management, decision making, strategic planning, delegation, leadership, ethics, entertainment industry, marketing and promotion, sales, entrepreneurship, human resources, careers.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No relevant knowledge areas were displayed.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two specific knowledge areas were evident.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three specific knowledge areas were evident.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Four or more specific knowledge areas were evident.

criteria.name: Statements are well-organized and clearly stated
criteria.description: The presented information is structured effectively and communicated with clarity.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) did not appear ready or organized.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) were prepared, but the presentation lacked a coherent progression.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation followed a clear and logical order.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation progressed logically, and all statements were well-structured.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.
criteria.description: Maintains a confident demeanor, composed body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection throughout.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: None of the specified communication skills were exhibited.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two of the listed communication skills (confidence, body language, eye contact, or voice projection) were shown.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three of the listed communication skills (confidence, body language, eye contact, or voice projection) were shown.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All communication skills were demonstrated, significantly enhancing the overall delivery.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions
criteria.description: Shows the capacity to respond to inquiries effectively.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) were unable to provide answers to questions.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Responses to questions were incomplete.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: All questions were answered thoroughly.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Engaged with the judges while providing comprehensive answers to questions.
